message:
fix(core,extent,types): re-acquire block_dev after inode mutations in rename/unlink and replace panicking u32 casts with fallible conversions

ffs-core: Adds block_dev re-acquisition calls after inode table mutations in
rename (cross-directory move with link count updates) and unlink (after child
inode deletion) paths. Without these, subsequent metadata writes could operate
on stale cached block device state. Also makes block_dev mutable in e2compr
compressed cluster write paths where the adapter needs re-acquisition.

ffs-extent: Replaces 4 panicking .expect() u32 conversions in
map_logical_to_physical with u32::try_from().map_err() returning
FfsError::InvalidGeometry with descriptive messages. Prevents panics on
corrupted or extremely large filesystem images.

ffs-types: Adds division-by-zero guards to block_to_group and inode_to_group
— returns GroupNumber(0) when blocks_per_group or inodes_per_group is zero,
preventing panics from crafted superblock values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
